title: Kadhalaada Lyrics Vivegam

unnodu vazhvadhu aanandhame
ovvoru pozhudhilum perinbamae

illaigla ingillai perinbamae

kaadhal aada kadhal aada

unnodu vazhvadhu aanandhame
ovvoru pozhudhilum perinbamae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhalaada?

The song Kadhalaada is a romantic melody that expresses love and longing.

Who are the singers of Kadhalaada?

The song is sung by Anirudh and Shashaa Tirpathi.

Who composed the music for Vivegam?

The music for Vivegam was composed by Anirudh.

What is the context of the song in the movie Vivegam?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the deep connection between the lead characters.

When was Kadhalaada released?

The song was released in 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vivegam, Kadhalaada is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and togetherness. Sung by Anirudh and Shashaa Tirpathi, the song conveys a sense of joy and serenity as it explores the emotions of the lead characters. The lyrics by Kabilan add depth to the melody, making it a memorable piece. The song evokes feelings of happiness and contentment, perfect for moments of love and celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the romance and magic with Kadhalaada from the movie Vivegam. Anirudh's enchanting music paired with Shashaa Tirpathi's soulful voice creates a mesmerizing melody. Dive into this beautiful duet that captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Living with you is happiness, every moment is joy. Endless needs are happiness, there are no leaves here, only joy.
I waited to dance with love, I tied flowers of affection with threads of desire.
You are the uncreated god, you are the true grace. The unending honey rain, let's create a new world with it.
Living with you is happiness, every moment is joy. Endless needs are happiness, there are no leaves here, only joy.
Even when the blue sky falls, you will be there. You give divine music and pure silence.
In the harsh battlefield, I will bloom as your sweat.
Like a flowing stream, I hold your hand and run.
The poison slowly spreads, we will rise above it.
When the child god appears on earth, life will flourish.
Living with you is happiness, every moment is joy. Endless needs are happiness, there are no leaves here, only joy.
Living with you, with you, with you is happiness.
